title: Improved packaging for natural peanut butter
abstract: The invention of the present disclosure is that of functional packaging systems useful for reducing the separation of solid and liquid constituents of its contents. The invention is particularly useful for preventing the undesirable separation of solid and oil phases of food products such as natural peanut butter that is manufactured without the use of undesirable additives such as hydrogenated vegetable oils, lecithin, monoglycerides, diglycerides and other substances that slow separation of the solid and oil phases from one another. In one embodiment, the invention comprises a container with a rotating base which when rotated actuates the agitation of the product contained within, as a result of the concurrent rotation of one or more axes configured with an agitator or equivalent means of stirring or mixing the contents. The invention is further provided with hermetic sealing means and the like to ensure food safety.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A functional packaging system for reducing the separation of solid and liquid constituents contained within, the system comprising: a container having at least one opening in its bottom surface, wherein the container is seated within a rotating base; at least one axle capable of engagement with the rotating base through the at least one opening, wherein engagement of the axle with the rotating base causes the axle to rotate when the rotating base is rotated; and at least one agitator capable of engagement with the at least one axle, wherein engagement of the agitator with the axle causes the agitator to rotate when the rotating base is rotated; wherein the at least one axle and at least one agitator is at least partially contained within the container such that the at least one agitator is configured to agitate contents of the container when rotated. 2. The functional packaging system of claim 1, further comprising at least one seal that at least partially prevents the contents of the container from coming in contact with the surrounding atmosphere. 3. The functional packaging system of claim 2, wherein the seal is a hermetic seal. 4. The functional packaging system of claim 1 , further comprising at least one cap that at least partially surrounds the at least one axle and the at least one opening is at least one open-ended indentation. 5. The functional packaging system of claim 4, wherein the at least one cap is configured with at least one member capable of engagement with the at least one open-ended indentation to form a seal that at least partially prevents the contents of the container from coming in contact with the surrounding atmosphere. 6. The functional packaging system of claim 5, wherein the seal is a hermetic seal. 7. The functional packaging system of claim 1, further comprising at least one engagement means, wherein the engagement means is configured to engage the at least one axle with the at least one agitator. 8. The functional packaging system of claim 7, wherein the at least one engagement means is a reversible engagement means. 9. The functional packaging system of claim 8 , wherein the at least one reversible engagement means comprises a spring-lock mechanism. 10. The functional packaging system of claim 9, wherein the at least one reversible engagement means is actuated by at least one button positioned atop the at least one agitator. 1 1. The functional packaging system of claim 1, further comprising a lid positioned atop the container. 12. The functional packaging system of claim 10, further comprising a lid positioned atop the container, wherein the lid is positioned above the at least one button. 13. The functional packaging system of claim 1 , wherein the rotating base, the at least one axle and the at least one agitator are provided as an integrated unit. 14. The functional packaging system of claim 4, wherein the rotating base, the at least one axle the at least one agitator and the at least one cap are provided as an integrated unit. 15. The functional packaging system of claim 1, further comprising at least one O-ring configured to create a seal between the at least one axle and the at least one opening. 16. The functional packaging system of claim 1, further comprising at least one O-ring configured to create a seal between the rotating base and the at least one opening. 17. The functional packaging system of claim 1, wherein the rotating base comprises two or more rotating base components. 18. The functional packaging system of claim 1 , wherein the contents of the container comprise at least one solid and at least one liquid component, wherein the separation of the at least one solid and at least one liquid component is reduced when the agitator is rotated. 19. A method of reversing the separation of the at least one solid and at least one liquid component of the contents of claim 18 comprising the step of rotating the rotating base. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein the contents consist of natural peanut butter, the at least one solid component comprises at least one peanut solid and the at least one liquid component comprises at least one peanut oil.
